title: Island Hopping
description: Explore limestone caves, hidden coves, and crystal-clear waters around Guindawahan Island and Tinagong Dagat. Book through our accredited operators at the Calatrava Port Terminal.

title: Waterfall Trekking
description: Six waterfalls across four barangays — from the dramatic Tago Falls, the highest in Calatrava at 7 to 9 meters, to the secluded Hidden Falls deep in Pagsangahan.

title: Snorkeling & Diving
description: LGU-accredited dive groups offer guided snorkeling and diving around vibrant reef ecosystems and rich marine life in the municipality's protected coastal waters.
